appraisal_events.evidence: « l'amie de Mlle M. Vinteuil eut la consolation d’assurer ... une gloire immortelle et compensatrice » ; « une souscription ... en vue de faire élever une statue à M. Vinteuil » ; et le Septuor révèle « toute l’œuvre de M. Vinteuil ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents the unveiling and understanding of Vinteuil's work as a revelation of his genius, crowned by public honors, which significantly elevates his artistic value and fame.

status_effects.explanation: The narration dedicates his artistic greatness (revelation of the work, immortal glory, statue project), which strongly increases the local esteem he enjoys.
